summary: Completed testing of scrolling fixes and UnifiedPhotoCard layout on /minted-photos and /photo-game pages. All scrolling fixes verified working - touch-action: pan-y is applied correctly and cards do NOT block finger-touch scrolling. Card layout order matches requirements.

issues: Gap-6 class present but computed gap is 11.25px instead of expected 24px - likely due to Tailwind rem scaling. Spacing is still adequate for tapping.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Scrolling fixes verified working on both /minted-photos Card View and /photo-game photo selection. touch-action: pan-y is correctly applied. Card flip animation works. Layout order is correct.

scrolling_minted_photos_card_view.details: touch-action: pan-y applied to grid container. Scrolling works when finger is over cards. 12 photo cards found with data-testid.

scrolling_photo_game_selection.details: touch-action: pan-y applied to photo selection container. Successfully scrolled through 12 photos. Scrolling NOT blocked by cards.

card_layout_order.details: Layout order correct: 1) Photo Image (top), 2) Name, 3) Dollar Value & Stars, 4) Scenery & Level, 5) Stamina, 6) Tap to flip button (bottom)

card_flip_animation.details: Flip button (data-testid='flip-card-btn') works. Card flips to show back with Base Value, XP meter, Total Dollar Value. Flip back button also works.

card_spacing_gap_6.details: gap-6 class is present on grid. Computed gap is 11.25px (not 24px) due to Tailwind rem scaling. Spacing is adequate for tapping between cards.

passive_touch_listeners.details: UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx has useEffect with passive touch listeners (lines 264-285). touchstart and touchmove handlers added with { passive: true }.

pointer_events_none_on_images.details: Images have style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }} to prevent blocking scroll (line 398 in UnifiedPhotoCard.jsx)
